## What should be added or improved?

Describe the skill, tool, or documentation change.

## Who is this for?

Describe the user, business type, or agent workflow this helps.

## Expected output

What should the skill or tool guide help an agent produce?

## References

Add official docs, APIs, examples, or related tools.
